data.description: Fed's Bowman: Smaller balance sheet as a percentage of GDP gives the Fed more optionality to respond to future shocks.
Fed's Bowman: The lower level of reserves might encourage banks to be more active in reserve positions and liquidity risk management.
Fed's Bowman: Reforming enhanced supplementary leverage ratio would address some of the problems permanent facilities like standing repo were designed to mitigate.
Fed's Bowman: Emergency lending facilities should be limited to single-purpose use in emergencies and not made permanent.
Fed's Bowman: Balance sheet tilted toward more shorter-dated securities would offer more flexibility.
Fed's Bowman: I strongly support holding only treasuries.
Fed's Bowman Speech on 'the approach to monetary policy decision-making'
Fed's Bowman: I see slower population growth and an ageing population as more prominent factors in pulling down neutral rate.

data.title: PomeGran named #1 in Telecom by The Globe and Mail, emphasizing their commitment to equitable connectivity.
data.description: PomeGran Inc. has been recognized as the top company in the telecommunications sector, underscoring its dedication to promoting broadband sovereignty and ensuring equitable connectivity throughout Canada. This achievement reflects PomeGran's emphasis on a fiber-first approach. The announcement was made in Toronto on September 26, 2025.

data.title: Fuse Oncology presents AI solutions at ASTRO 2025 to streamline oncology workflows. Leader in AI-powered solutions aims to unify vendor-agnostic workflows, showcasing at GE HealthCare.
data.description: In Boone, North Carolina, on September 26, 2025, Fuse Oncology, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven oncology workflow solutions, is dedicated to streamlining radiation oncology processes with vendor-independent tools that offer tangible benefits. This objective will be showcased at the upcoming ASTRO event, where GE HealthCare will also be present.

data.title: Event Modules provides 10 rapid-deploy mobile facilities for 2025 National Cricket League, focusing on player and fan experiences.
data.description: In Dallas on September 26, 2025, the National Cricket League (NCL) announced its continued partnership with Event Modules for the second consecutive year to enhance the player and fan experiences at the 2025 Championship held at the University of Texas at Dallas. This year's collaboration will extend to 10 different...

data.title: Boeing to certify new 737 Max and 787 Dreamliner jets after FAA approval.
data.description: According to the latest reports, the Federal Aviation Administration has granted permission to the aerospace company to independently certify certain new jets, including a number of 737 Max and 787 Dreamliner aircrafts. This decision marks a significant development for the company, as they can now approve these planes without having to seek separate FAA validation. This move is expected to expedite the certification process for approximately [insert number] 737 Max and [insert number] 787 Dreamliner models, ultimately benefiting the aerospace industry as a whole.

data.title: GitLab ranked as a Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for DevOps Platforms for the third year, among 10 vendors in 2025.
data.description: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. (NASDAQ: GTLB) has been recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for DevOps Platforms. Among 10 vendors evaluated, GitLab has secured this position, following its recent acknowledgment as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for AI Code Assistants. This marks the third year in a row that GitLab has achieved Leader status. According to Gartner, DevOps platforms play a key role in simplifying the software development and delivery process.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® to host MORE THAN PINK Walk at SeaWorld San Antonio in 2025, raising money for breast cancer mission.
data.description: In San Antonio, the 2025 MORE THAN PINK Walk organized by Susan G. Komen® will bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and allies to support the cause. The event aims to raise funds for Komen's mission and foster community unity. A notable update this year is a collaboration with SeaWorld San Antonio, offering Registered Participants the opportunity to buy a SeaWorld Day Ticket for $30, marking the beginning of a local partnership. This event signifies a powerful effort to support and honor those affected by breast cancer.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® will host Race for the Cure in Dallas at UT Dallas with goal of raising $1.13M for breast cancer.
data.description: In Dallas, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization globally, is organizing the 2025 Dallas North Texas Race for the Cure. The event will bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals battling metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and supporters. The aim is to raise $1.13 million during this race to fund Komen's mission. This fundraising effort is crucial for supporting Komen's life-saving initiatives and investments in breast cancer research. The event serves as a platform for community unity and solidarity.

data.title: Bernstein Private Wealth Management's Global Families team wins Financial Advisor Team of the Year at STEP Private Client Awards. (Number of wins: 2)
data.description: New York, September 26, 2025 - Bernstein Private Wealth Management, a division of AllianceBernstein L.P. (NYSE: AB), has been recognized with a prestigious award for the second time. The firm's Global Families team received this distinction, showcasing their exceptional performance and expertise.
